title: Old Logo
description: Reimplements the silly block rendered logo from Minecraft Alpha versions!
body:
A silly mod that reimplements Beta 1.3_01's animated block rendered logo (the one that was added in Alpha 1.0.4) to b1.7.3, including the scrolling background from Indev 0.31.  

You can change it and tweak as much as you'd like with the config file `.minecraft/config/oldLogo.json`.

Needs **[Babric](https://babric.github.io/)**
